category_sources: source_facts.description says pairwise aligner for DNA sequences; official LASTZ documentation describes sequence alignment and DNA sequence formats.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page title uses LASTZ; source_facts.name is lastz.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages documentation and includes availability and command reference material.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/lastz/lastz, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official LASTZ docs identify DNA pairwise alignment and supported sequence inputs.
